content: Meta-prediction question 42185 asks if CP for Q40841 will be >65% on Feb 28. Current CP = 0.65 exactly. In Feb 15-18 window, CP was at 0.65 76.7% of the time, below 23.3%, never above. 10-day CP changes show mean positive drift of +0.011 with 51% of changes being positive. Key catalysts: Opus 4.6/GPT-5.3-Codex released Feb 5, METR update Feb 6. METR hasn't yet measured newest models. 795 forecasters = stable base.
